coding.display: Hormone receptor positive with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative status

description: Neoadjuvant chemotherapy can substitute for adjuvant chemotherapy in HR-positive HER2-negative disease when surgical pathology or genomic testing is not required for the decision.
name: UseNeoadjuvantChemotherapyWithoutSurgicalData
title: Use neoadjuvant chemotherapy when the chemotherapy decision does not require surgical data
